lastReleaseMessage: Admin-configurable shift options and a full visual polish...

barRaise.topFinding: The audit-to-fix loop is firing, but the commit gate behind it is not opening, and the dirty tree is now accreting instead of draining. The 06-02 report's central call was to cut v0.3.1 and commit the tree; nothing committed. The last commit is still b41b853 (2026-05-29), and the working tree grew this cycle: scripts/write-dashboard-status.ps1 now carries real uncommitted hardening on top of the 11 uncommitted DESIGN.md edits and eight untracked BAR_RAISE reports. The one genuine HIGH is unchanged: the Discord webhook URL is still committed and still not gitignored. Everything else is operational drift that a single v0.3.1 commit would clear. The blocker remains the commit, not the work.
